news.headline: Goldman ranks #1 adviser by deal value in Q1 2026 (~$267B)
news.why_it_matters: Goldman led all advisers by deal value in Q1 2026 and holds roles on the majority of the quarter's megadeals — the most complex, multi-jurisdiction diligence processes in the market.
news.suggested_action: Anchor outreach around Goldman's megadeal pipeline; large-cap, cross-border processes are the highest-complexity data room use case.

deal_clock.event: #1 adviser by deal value

news.headline: Goldman and Morgan Stanley leading Anthropic's IPO
news.why_it_matters: A landmark AI IPO reinforces the capital-markets revival. IPO mandates are diligence-intensive across legal, financial, and regulatory workstreams.
news.suggested_action: Open an ECM conversation about secure, auditable diligence environments for live offerings.

deal_clock.event: Lead underwriters reported

talking_points.text: Goldman leads the Street on deal value this year — the through-line is scale and complexity, exactly where data room setup either accelerates or slows a process.
talking_points.use_with: GS large-cap M&A and ECM teams
